old: symbol. ISO 639-3 language code for Mochi.

sloe: noun. The small, astringent, wild fruit of the blackthorn (Prunus spinosa).
sloyd: noun. A Scandinavian system of handicraft-based education that emphasizes the importance of practical, hands-on work to develop cognitive
sned: noun. A cut, a cutting; a slash, a slight wound; a lopping or pruning.
